chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. S-71 of 2026. (Manzoor Ahmed Khaskheli vs. P.O Sindh and others) Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.233/2026 2. For hearing of main case. 30.03.2026. Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------------------- O R D E R Ali Haider 'Ada' J.; Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed that the Respondents be directed not to cause harassment; besides provide legal protection in accordance with law. However, perusal of record reveals that prior to filing of this petition, petitioner has approached to Additional Sessions Judge/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Mirwah, by filing an application under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. which was allowed vide order dated 26.02.2026, whereby official Respondents were directed to provide protection to the petitioner and his family members. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that despite of aforesaid order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, the life of the petitioner is still under threats. While during confrontation of the arguments with regard to approach before the Justice of Peace for compliance of its own order, he is unable to respond and constantly asserted for issuing directions to the official Respondents for providing protection. In exercise of constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199, this Court cannot assume to make compliance of the order of Justice of Peace thereof, as it is domain of learned Justice of Peace for ensuring compliance. In sequel to above, instant petition, being misconceived and unjustified, is hereby dismissed in limine. JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
